description:
Should you claim car insurance after accident or not? Is it okay to claim car insurance for car dents, minor damages? After calculating the file charges, total loss and cancellation of NCB post car insurance claim, you might feel that, claiming the insurance was not the right decision. In this video, I have discussed whether you should claim your insurance after car crash or not and what would be the ideal situation for the same. Check this Hindi video for more details. 

If you are in Pune & want to talk about your car or bike on Sahi Gaadi then get in touch via comments below.

More videos for you:
Car Insurance All Terms Explained: https://youtu.be/CyIA_nSpZU4

#sahigaadi #carinsurance #insuranceclaims
tags: insurance claim for loss of profit
car insurance claim kab lena chahiye
car insurance claim for minor damage
car insurance claim me kitna paisa lagta hai
should i claim car insurance or not

comments.text:
Many commenting wrongly.

What he is saying is true. My car now has NCB of Rs. 25k (50% of 50k premium of Own Damage). If for 10-15k I claim now, Ill lose 25k bonus and also 50% will be lost. So it makes sense not to claim for small amounts.
comments.author: @Joinsuri

comments.text: kyo jhuth bol rhe ho own damage ka 50K premium kaha hota hai agar hota to total insurance amount kitna rhta hai apke behivle ka ?
comments.author: @navneet-dubey

comments.text: ​ @navneet-dubey yeh jhoot bol hai yaa isko pta nahi hai. NCB hamesha OD pe ata hain woh bhi depreciation lagne ke baad. 15000 pe 20% NCB 3000 hai. Agar aap ka claim value NCB ke 50% hai toh claim mat lo, other zaroor lo. Hum pehle le insurance company ko paise de chuke hai. Kyu faida na le apne paise ka
comments.author: @networks24x73

comments.text: Ap khud se kitna pay kie 50% NCB k lie
comments.author: @VINAYRAY-q4z

comments.text: Flawed logics and thoughts. In real world, you get NCB only on own damage premium which comes to less than 1500 rupees. So better take claim if damage costs more than 7-8K. I got 35% NCB of INR and 1000 on a total premium of 14K and not 35% of total premium.
comments.author: @ravis1ngh

comments.text: 15-20 thousand jayega kya mujeh claim karna chaiye?
comments.author: @dhamenjamatia4800

comments.text: No. If you don’t take it, You get discount of like max 1000 - 1500 or so because it’s only on own damage. Also, if you take the claim, your insurance renewal cost may increase so keep that in mind. But it will increase by like 2-3K max and you loose benefits also. So this you can get fixed from your pocket. 15K is fine. Anything around 30K or more would make sense
comments.author: @ravis1ngh
